title: Cottage Cheese Flatbread
description: Crispy, chewy flatbread made with just cottage cheese and flour. 15g protein per flatbread. Works as pizza crust, wrap, or naan substitute.
steps: Blend cottage cheese in a blender or food processor until completely smooth, about 30 seconds.
Add flour, salt, and any seasonings. Blend until a sticky dough forms.
Divide dough in half. On a floured surface, roll each piece into a thin round (about 8 inches).
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Brush lightly with olive oil.
Cook flatbread 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown spots appear and it's cooked through.
Serve warm as-is, or top with your favorite toppings for a quick pizza.
notes: Must blend the cottage cheese smooth - lumps = weird texture.
Dough is sticky - use plenty of flour when rolling.
For pizza: top with sauce and cheese, broil 2-3 min until melted.
